summary: LUMEN 2.0 Phase A2 — Certificate Engine testing completed. All backend APIs working, A2 invariants green, public verify privacy-safe, burn & re-issue flow verified with A1 safety, all frontend pages functional.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/admin/certificates returns 5 active certs + counts (active/voided/replaced/expired/draft)
Backend: GET /api/admin/certificates/invariants/check returns all_ok=true with 4 checks (active_units_match_registry, single_active_per_owner, every_active_ownership_has_cert, verify_codes_unique)
Backend: GET /api/investor/certificates returns 3 active certs for client@atlas.dev
Backend: GET /api/public/certificates/verify/DAE7-E6EF-7196 returns sanitized view WITHOUT investor_id or investor_name (PRIVACY-CRITICAL CHECK PASSED)
Backend: GET /api/investor/certificates/{id}/pdf returns valid PDF with %PDF header (15.5KB)
Backend: GET /api/admin/registry/invariants returns all_ok=true (A1 registry invariants)

Backend: BURN & RE-ISSUE flow verified - executed secondary buy-now trade (10000 UAH), buyer received new active certificate (LMN-2026-000010) with updated units (2500), old certificate moved to history, A2 invariants stayed all_ok=true, A1 registry invariants stayed all_ok=true
Frontend: Public /certificates/verify/DAE7-E6EF-7196 renders valid certificate card with asset/SPV/units/%/date/code, shows 'Сертифікат дійсний', includes 'private data not disclosed' note
Frontend: Public /certificates/verify/INVALID-CODE shows 'Сертифікат не знайдено' message

Frontend: Investor /investor/certificates page loads with nav 'Сертифікати', displays 3+ active certificate cards with units/%/value, PDF button opens PDF, Перевірити link opens public verify, Історія button opens event drawer

Frontend: Admin /admin/certificates page loads with nav 'Сертифікати', displays status counts (5 active, 4 replaced, 2 voided), invariants pill shows 'Інваріанти OK', Звірити (reconcile) button present, filter tabs (Усі/Активні/Замінені/Анульовані) working, search input present, table shows 11 certificate rows, clicking row opens detail drawer with Перевипустити/Анулювати/PDF actions
